text:
In the event that the [respondent] / [applicant] wishes to purchase the new home with the assistance of a mortgage, then [he] / [she] may do so, provided that:

the mortgage is secured with a reputable mortgage provider;

the borrowing does not account for more than [percentage]% of the purchase price; and

[he] / [she] shall discharge as and when each payment becomes due, be solely responsible for and in any event indemnify the [applicant] / [respondent] against all interest and capital repayments due in respect of the mortgage until [the termination of the [tenancy agreement] / [irrevocable licence]] / [the [applicant] / [respondent] and the child[ren] of the family vacate the new home] or the court discharges [him] / [her] from this obligation.

The [applicant] / [respondent] shall discharge as and when each payment becomes due, be solely responsible for and in any event indemnify the [respondent] / [applicant] against all [reasonable] sums due in respect of service charge, council tax, utilities (including but not limited to gas, electricity, water and telephone accounts), and buildings and contents insurance premiums in respect of the new home until [the termination of the [tenancy agreement] / [irrevocable licence]] / [the [applicant] / [respondent] and the child[ren] of the family vacate the new home] or the court discharges [him] / [her] from this obligation.

The [applicant] / [respondent] shall be responsible for all [routine] maintenance and [decorative] repairs to the property.

The cost of insuring the property and of carrying out structural repairs [insert definition] shall be [the responsibility of the [applicant] / [respondent]] / [shared equally] / [specify other], provided that no works of structural repair shall be carried out to the property unless agreed by the parties or ordered by the court.
